subcodes.first_line: O herald of the Covenant! The letter which thou hadst addressed to Jináb-i-Manshádí was noted and carefully perused [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منادی پیمان نامه ای که بجناب منشادی مرقوم نموده بودید ملاحظه گردید و بدقت
subcodes.subjects: @status of kings; future of monarchy, @relationship between government and people, @non-participation in politics, @constitutional revolution in Iran, @obedience to and respect for government authority
